'''Armadid''' was a large, [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-using]] predator that stalked the [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]] of [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nubia/Legends|Nubia]]. The creature measured about 3 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length and had [[Bone/Legends|bony]], armored plates on its domed back. It had a short, stocky tail with a [[Crab/Legends|crablike]] pincer at the end. Its short legs could retract beneath protective armor. Its head was triangular, with a [[Tooth/Legends|tooth]]-filled maw and a pair of curved horns used to gore prey. When hunting, it lay in wait, using its gray armor as camouflage in the rocky terrain. With a short [[Force speed/Legends|burst of speed]], it could overtake unsuspecting prey.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
